evals.name: all-time-chinese
evals.prompt: 帮我做个 token 年度报告
evals.expected_output: Folder at ~/Desktop/tokenbar-report-YYYY-MM-DD/ containing index.html (interactive card-draw landing) + 6 themed persona HTML files (01-xiuxian through 06-jojo) + data.json. Narrative in Chinese. Window covers full TokenBar data range (all-time).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 6 persona HTML files present (01-xiuxian.html, 02-wuxia.html, 03-santi.html, 04-shuihu.html, 05-talk.html, 06-jojo.html)
index.html present, contains card-draw JS (a 'drawBtn' element), and links to all 6 persona files
06-jojo.html contains the SVG radar (class 'stand-radar'), psyche-card blocks, stand-card block, and a stand-card-cry block
06-jojo.html persona badge reads 'JOJO' (not '人性透视' from v4) — grep for the badge contents

06-jojo.html stand-card-name is one of the S-tier whitelist entries (e.g. ザ・ワールド / スタープラチナ / クレイジー・ダイヤモンド / ゴールド・エクスペリエンス / キング・クリムゾン / メイド・イン・ヘブン / タスク / D4C / キラークイーン / etc.). NEVER an invented name like 'BLACKOUT MIDNIGHT'.
data.json present, parses as JSON, has cost.totalUSD > 0 and dataWindow.eventCount > 0
every persona HTML opens in a browser without console errors
no leftover '{{placeholder}}' tokens anywhere in any rendered HTML
narrative text in every persona is in Chinese (matching the prompt's language)
the 6 persona themes are visually distinct — at minimum, their <style> blocks differ by > 60% content hash
no shared 'profile-card' dossier section exists in any persona HTML — v5 killed the shared dossier (search for 'profile-card' class should miss in all 6 files)

each persona renders its own题材化 identity_card section: xiuxian uses 境界/灵气 language; wuxia uses 门派/内功 language; santi uses 文明/智子 language; shuihu uses 108/绰号 language; talk uses 段子/开场 language; jojo uses 替身/dossier language

lens isolation: xiuxian must not mention 替身/A-E/智子/108/段子/门派; wuxia must not mention 替身/境界/智子/108/段子; santi must not mention 替身/境界/门派/108/段子; shuihu must not mention 替身/境界/智子/门派/段子; talk must not mention 替身/境界/智子/门派/108; jojo must not mention 境界/灵气/门派/智子/108/段子

CRITICAL: max pairwise content overlap across the 6 rendered persona HTML files (narrative text only, ignoring <style> + <script> + chrome) must be STRICTLY LESS THAN 0.30 (30%) measured via scripts/measure_overlap.py — this is the v5 hard requirement that motivated the redesign

evals.name: windowed-30d-mixed
evals.prompt: 最近一个月我在 AI 上烧了多少？做个 html wrap 看看
evals.expected_output: Same output structure as eval 1 but time window narrowed to the last 30 days. Numbers must reflect the narrower window (smaller token counts, fewer events).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 6 persona HTML files (01-xiuxian, 02-wuxia, 03-santi, 04-shuihu, 05-talk, 06-jojo) + index.html present
date_range_days in the report equals 30 (±1)
total_tokens in the report is strictly less than the all-time figure
before generation, the assistant confirmed the time window with the user OR explicitly stated the inferred window
narrative is in Chinese with informal register (matches the user's casual phrasing)
max pairwise overlap < 0.30 (measure_overlap.py)

evals.name: english-quarter
evals.prompt: Generate an HTML report of my AI coding usage this quarter — show me how I've been spending tokens.
evals.expected_output: Same output structure, but narrative in English. Window covers the last calendar quarter (~90 days).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 6 persona HTML files + index.html present

narrative text in every persona is in English (matching the prompt's language). 题材-specific noun tags (修仙 → 'Cultivation', 武侠 → 'Wuxia Chronicle', 三体 → 'Dark Forest', 水浒 → 'Outlaws of the Marsh', 脱口秀 → 'Stand-up Special', JOJO → 'JOJO') may stay; the narrative prose around them must be English.
date_range_days is between 80 and 100 (i.e. roughly a quarter)
the talk persona uses English stand-up cadence (pauses marked by (beat) or similar)
max pairwise overlap < 0.30 (measure_overlap.py)
